title: tephrosia lepida subsp. lepida
intro: Tephrosia lepida subsp. lepida, also known as the delicate bean or delicate pea-flowered tephrosia, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of tephrosia lepida subsp. lepida include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions, such as eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations of tephrosia lepida subsp. lepida can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
